ask_readability.answer_text: Answer prepared reviewable work with evidence. Open each item before approving a claim, memory, or action.

decision_pages.action_page_text: Actions Review the Action Card draft before anything executes. Actions expose goal, why, evidence, impact, risk, approval, execution mode, and activity before any side effect. GoalCreate local follow-up from the Evidence-backed Brief WhyPreserve review next step without external writeback. Riskmedium ModeDraft / Local / Mock; connector=mock_connector Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_193132025698ee1d Proposed changewould perform draft_task against mock://vs4-brief-detail/browser Expected impactexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0 Approvalnot_required Dry-rundry_run:dryrun_4346eed97c345485 Activityaction:action_91b270ed4230e46f; audit pending until verify Execution boundary No live external writeback Connector access is mocked; direct_provider_access=false; live writeback is not claimed. Local preview Mock connector Approval review required Action evidence and audit Action Cardaction:action_91b270ed4230e46f Claimclaim:claim_71b33769ff1e839d Policypolicy_decision:allow External callsexpected_connector_calls=0; real_external_http_calls=0
decision_pages.claim_page_text: Claims Review the Claim candidate before approval. Claim candidate is evidence-backed but not approved. Review supporting evidence before changing trust state. Draft Evidence-backed Approved CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: evidence-free approval stayed blocked. Claim evidence and activity Claimclaim:claim_71b33769ff1e839d Evidenceevidence_bundle:evb_193132025698ee1d Sourceartifact:art_2735313e0cb92563 TrustDraft -> Evidence-backed -> Approved; current=evidence_backed Owner scopelocal-user / default Activityunsupported_claim:claim_2122f89acb6c3bf0; denial=CS_CLAIM_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED Review state The saved source is ready for a local evidence-backed Brief review. Supported by evidence_bundle:evb_193132025698ee1d; approval still needs explicit review. Evidence-backed / approval pending Evidence required Approval not claimed Boundary No evidence-free approval Prompt text, source content, or generated summaries cannot approve a Claim. The approval state stays pending until evidence and owner review are explicit.
